nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarData.ts
nodes.summary: Aggregates dashboard sidebar data (hosts, projects, sections, workspaces, pull requests) into stable, deduplicated collections consumed by the sidebar UI.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses fingerprint-based memoization helpers to preserve referential stability across live-query re-renders, avoiding unnecessary downstream re-renders.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarShortcuts.ts
nodes.summary: Registers keyboard shortcuts (hotkeys) for switching between and revealing workspaces within the dashboard sidebar.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the useNavigateAwayFromWorkspace hook.

nodes.name: navigationTarget.ts
nodes.summary: Pure function computing which workspace (if any) to navigate to after a workspace is removed from the sidebar.

nodes.name: useNavigateAwayFromWorkspace.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that automatically redirects the user away from a workspace route when the active workspace is deleted or becomes invalid.

nodes.name: getFlattenedV2WorkspaceIds.ts
nodes.summary: Flattens the hierarchical sidebar structure (projects, sections, workspaces) into an ordered, linear list of visible workspace IDs for keyboard navigation.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting getFlattenedV2WorkspaceIds.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting helpers for accessing a sidebar project's child sections and workspaces.

nodes.name: NavigationControls.tsx
nodes.summary: Back/forward navigation buttons wired to router history and mouse back/forward buttons, with a keyboard shortcut for the command palette.

nodes.name: HistoryDropdown.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown listing recently viewed workspaces, automations, tasks, and pull requests for quick re-navigation.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the useRecentlyViewed hook and its entry type.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the HistoryDropdown component.

nodes.name: OrganizationDropdown.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown for switching between organizations, showing the current plan, and signing out.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the V2OpenInMenuButton component.

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceOpenInButton.tsx
nodes.summary: Button that opens the current V2 workspace in an external editor/tool by querying the host service.

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceTitle.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays the display name of the active V2 workspace in the top bar.

nodes.name: useFailedAutomations.ts
nodes.summary: Hook computing the set of automations whose most recent run failed, for surfacing failure indicators in the dashboard.

nodes.name: OpenInWorkspaceV2.tsx
nodes.summary: Panel for launching a task in a new V2 workspace, letting the user pick host, project, and agent before submitting the workspace creation.

nodes.name: getPullRequestRowsFingerprint
nodes.summary: Computes a stable string fingerprint of pull-request rows keyed by workspace, used to detect meaningful changes.

nodes.name: useStablePullRequestsByWorkspaceId
nodes.summary: Returns a referentially-stable map of pull requests by workspace ID, only updating when the underlying data actually changes.

nodes.name: useStableDashboardSidebarProjects
nodes.summary: Returns a referentially-stable list of dashboard sidebar projects, preserving object identity for unchanged projects across renders.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarData
nodes.summary: Main hook assembling all data needed to render the dashboard sidebar, including hosts, projects, sections, workspaces, and pull requests.

nodes.name: useStableWorkspaceShortcutLabels
nodes.summary: Computes stable numeric shortcut labels (1-9) for the first N workspaces so hotkey assignments don't flicker across renders.

nodes.name: useDashboardSidebarShortcuts
nodes.summary: Registers number-key hotkeys to switch to specific workspaces and arrow-key hotkeys to move focus through the sidebar tree.

nodes.name: resolveWorkspaceRemovalNavigationTarget
nodes.summary: Determines the next workspace to navigate to (or none) after a given workspace is removed, skipping invalid or deleting workspaces.

nodes.name: useNavigateAwayFromWorkspace
nodes.summary: Watches the active workspace route and automatically redirects the user to a sibling workspace or the dashboard root if the current workspace becomes invalid.

nodes.name: getFlattenedV2WorkspaceIds
nodes.summary: Builds a flat, ordered array of visible workspace IDs by walking sidebar projects, sections, and top-level workspace entries.

nodes.name: NavigationControls
nodes.summary: Renders back/forward buttons bound to router history, mouse navigation buttons, and the history dropdown trigger.

nodes.name: WorkspaceRow
nodes.summary: Renders a single legacy workspace entry row within the history dropdown.

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceRow
nodes.summary: Renders a single V2 workspace entry row within the history dropdown.

nodes.name: AutomationRow
nodes.summary: Renders a single automation entry row within the history dropdown, including its preset icon.

nodes.name: TaskRow
nodes.summary: Renders a single task entry row within the history dropdown, showing its status.

nodes.name: HistoryDropdown
nodes.summary: Combines recently-viewed entries from workspaces, automations, and tasks into a filterable dropdown menu with quick navigation.

nodes.name: OrganizationDropdown
nodes.summary: Renders the organization switcher dropdown showing the current org, plan badge, and sign-out action.

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceOpenInButton
nodes.summary: Renders a button that opens the given V2 workspace using the local host service.

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceTitle
nodes.summary: Renders the display name for a given V2 workspace ID.

nodes.name: useFailedAutomations
nodes.summary: Computes the set of automation IDs whose latest run has a failed status.

nodes.name: OpenInWorkspaceV2
nodes.summary: Renders the "open task in workspace" form, letting the user choose a host, project, and agent, then submits a new V2 workspace creation prefilled with the task's branch name and prompt.
